steps.t: Calenglad is inside the keep on Tinnudir. You have entered the keep on Tinnudir to confront Mordrambor, the imprisoned Black Númenórean.
Tadan is inside the room atop the stairs, where Mordrambor was being held prisoner. The Black Númenórean has escaped from his prison, and there is no …
Calenglad is inside the keep on Tinnudir. Mordrambor has escaped, and in his wake, he has left the dead and the dying.
